title: Tychee-style composition in 10 minutes
thesis: Tychee's problem (fragmented, air-gapped satellite ground software) is a uds-mesh composition problem; the composition is the deliverable.
script: Compose four mock ground-software components (telemetry-decoder, orbit-prop, ccsds-uplink, mission-planner) into one MeshPointerManifest with four pinned SHAs + cosign signatures; deploy as a sibling bundle.
cli: for c in telemetry-decoder orbit-prop ccsds-uplink mission-planner; do ... done; uds zarf package deploy /tmp/tychee-mocks/bundle.yaml --confirm
expected_output: Four component tarballs hashed+signed; manifest cosign verify OK; OTEL span set emitted.
fallback: Show the pre-built manifest + four .tar.zst hashes; run cosign verify-blob on the manifest only.
